name: manse-creator
description: Create, validate, publish, and list open Manse motion games from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Make and publish open motion games with Codex
interface.longDescription: Turn a plain-language idea into a self-contained Manse game Site, preview it safely, validate packs and assets, publish with Sites, and prepare a reviewed Showcase listing.
defaultPrompt: Create a gentle three-minute Manse motion game for ages 6–9.
Preview and validate this Manse game without enabling the camera.
Publish this validated game as its own Site, then verify public access.
